title: Comet Protocol for FFPE Slides - Benchmarking Project SenNet
author: Nicola Neretti
materials: Prepare the reagents according to the reagents protocol attached and run the Comet according to the manufactures guideline. Comet_reagent_preparation_skin.pdf Comet_reagent_preparation_lung.pdf
Trim block until sample is exposed
Citrate buffer 1x working solution 7ml 10x Citrate buffer pH 6.0 (Abcam AB64214) Add 63 ml distilled water

steps.title: Samples are placed on ice for at least 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Samples are placed on ice for at least 20 minutes

steps.title: Sections are laid on a water...
steps.instruction: Sections are laid on a water bath that is between 40-45˚C to unfold wrinkles

steps.title: Sections are picked up onto a SuperFrost Plus slide
steps.instruction: Sections are picked up onto a SuperFrost Plus slide

steps.title: Slides are air dried at room temperature for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: Slides are air dried at room temperature for 30 minutes

steps.title: Slides are placed in an oven at 60˚C overnight
steps.instruction: Slides are placed in an oven at 60˚C overnight

steps.title: Deparaffinize and hydrate tissue sections through...
steps.instruction: Deparaffinize and hydrate tissue sections through Histoclear 2×5 min (in fume hood), 100% ethanol 2×5 min, 90% ethanol 5 min, 70% ethanol 5 min, distilled water 2×5 min. These steps are performed in Coplin Jars

steps.title: Fill the water basin with deionized water
steps.instruction: Fill the water basin with deionized water

steps.title: Place the plastic steaming compartment atop the water basin
steps.instruction: Place the plastic steaming compartment atop the water basin

steps.title: Place an empty Coplin jar in the steaming compartment
steps.instruction: Place an empty Coplin jar in the steaming compartment

steps.title: Turn on the steamer until steam...
steps.instruction: Turn on the steamer until steam is visible escaping the vent. Keep the lid closed

steps.title: Using a hot plate or microwave,...
steps.instruction: Using a hot plate or microwave, boil ~75 ml of citrate buffer 1x working solution

steps.title: Using heat resistant gloves, carefully pour...
steps.instruction: Using heat resistant gloves, carefully pour the boiling sodium citrate buffer into Coplin jar within the steaming compartment

steps.title: Add slides to Coplin jar, cover...
steps.instruction: Add slides to Coplin jar, cover in aluminum foil and close lid

steps.title: Turn off steamer and remove lid
steps.instruction: Turn off steamer and remove lid. Make sure citrate buffer solution is still covering entire tissue

steps.title: Let slides to cool down in...
steps.instruction: Let slides to cool down in the citrate buffer 20-30 minutes at room temperature (or to cool it faster place on ice until buffer is cold)

steps.title: Wash sections in distilled water 2×5 min
steps.instruction: Wash sections in distilled water 2×5 min

steps.title: Wash sections for 5 min PBS on shaker
steps.instruction: Wash sections for 5 min PBS on shaker
